---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature or enhancement for REA
title: "[Feature] "
labels: ["enhancement", "triage"]
assignees: []
---

## Problem Statement

What problem does this feature solve? Describe the use case and why existing tools are insufficient.

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature or enhancement you would like to see. Include:

- Which REA tool(s) this affects (direct, enhanced, or session tools)
- Expected inputs and outputs
- How it integrates with the existing MCP workflow

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches or workarounds you have tried.

## Additional Context

- Relevant Hopper API methods or concepts:
- Links to related issues or discussions:
- Would this require changes to the bridge (`bridge/hopper_bridge.py`)?
